queries.query: Can you check how I'm calling OpenAI here and make it better? I have a translate_to_spanish() function with a hardcoded prompt and no tests.
Run /loop-architect on this repo. I want a full AI optimization audit.
How do I stop my agent from failing? It runs shell commands in a while-true loop and sometimes spends $5 before I can ctrl-c.

I have a linter-output classifier that picks which file to blame for a build failure. It's just a prompt template right now. How do I turn it into something I can actually measure and compile against examples?
Help me set up an eval suite for the coding agent I'm building. I want the agent's own rules file to get patched when it fails an eval.
How do I connect a prompt optimizer to my project? I have a small dataset of input/output pairs for a JSON parser I built on top of gpt-4o-mini.
Our coding agent calls subprocess.run with shell=True on anything the LLM emits. Before we optimize the prompt, what should we do?
I want to audit our AI workspace and figure out where to start optimizing. We have prompts in three different services and no evals anywhere.
Explain what JWT is and how RS256 differs from HS256. I'm writing a one-pager for our security team.
Refactor this typescript function to use early returns instead of nested if statements.
Our consumer signup form has a 60% drop-off rate. Help me reduce friction in the 4-step form.
Design a new homepage hero section for our marketing site. We sell developer tools but the hero is for general buyers.
Review my python script import_orders.py for style and pep8 issues.
I want to do an agent-readiness review of this repo so coding assistants stop tripping on it. The repo has AGENTS.md but it's auto-generated and wrong.
Audit our docs site for developer experience issues. The SDK reference is fine but the tutorials are out of date.
